text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What an amazingly lucky outcome! I<n>took first! A
surprise victory for<n>Matikanefukukitaru!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You didn't fail me, Trainer, and neither<n>did the
great Shiraoki! Just as I<n>thought...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: The heavens are always smiling upon<n>me!
choice_data_list: Hey, don't get too carried away.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! No one can come close to<n>rivaling one such
as me! And that's<n>no exaggeration!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What a joyous occasion! Which is<n>why...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I want you to have this as a<n>thank-you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's a lucky charm that helps withtaking the bones out of your seabream. It's to celebrate the joy thathas me bream-ing!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not too sure about the gift, but I<n>appreciate the
sentiment nonetheless!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Argh! I know that, obviously! I'm not<n>getting
carried away, really!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Well, I am being carried by thiswave of good luck, though! Ehehe!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And it's thanks to your guidance that<n>I'm able to
ride that wave! On that<n>note...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I want you to have this as a<n>thank-you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's a lucky charm that helps you<n>befriend surfers!
That way you can<n>catch some gnarly waves of
your<n>own!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not too sure about the gift, but I<n>appreciate the
sentiment nonetheless!
